name: browserbase
description: Create and manage headless browser sessions in the cloud with Browserbase

tools.name: List Sessions
tools.description: List browser sessions, optionally filtered by status

status.description: Filter by status: PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, ERROR, or TIMED_OUT

historicalSummary.omitted: connection URLs, browser settings, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Create Session
tools.description: Create a new cloud browser session (consumes plan browser minutes)

projectId.description: Browserbase project ID (omit to infer from the API key)

region.description: Region to run the session in, e.g. us-west-2, us-east-1, eu-central-1, ap-southeast-1

timeout.description: Session timeout in seconds before it is automatically ended

keepAlive.description: Keep the session alive after disconnects (paid plans only)

tools.name: Get Session
tools.description: Get a session's status, connection URL, and metadata

tools.name: Release Session
tools.description: Request release of a running session to stop billing for it

status.description: Set to REQUEST_RELEASE to end the session

projectId.description: Project ID the session belongs to (optional)

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List the Browserbase projects available to the API key

prompts.title: Show running sessions
prompts.prompt: List my Browserbase sessions that are currently RUNNING and release any I no longer need.

prompts.title: Start a browser session
prompts.prompt: Create a new Browserbase session and give me its ID and connection details.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Browserbase API Setup

steps.title: Create a Browserbase account
steps.description: Sign up at https://www.browserbase.com — the free plan includes browser hours for testing.

steps.title: Copy your API key and project ID
steps.description: In the dashboard, open Settings to find your API key (bb_...) and your default project ID. Each key belongs to a project.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add it to your .env file as BROWSERBASE_API_KEY=bb_... — requests authenticate with the X-BB-API-Key header.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Projects tool, then List Sessions. Create Session can omit projectId — it is inferred from the API key.

notes: Sessions are billed by browser minutes — release sessions you are done with via the Release Session tool
Driving the browser (navigation, clicks) happens over the session's CDP connectUrl with Playwright/Puppeteer/Stagehand, not through this REST API
keepAlive sessions are only available on paid plans
